title: erythroxylum nummularia
intro: Erythroxylum nummularia, commonly known as the coca plant, is a species of flowering plant native to South America. The leaves of the coca plant have been used for centuries for their medicinal properties, including its ability to alleviate nausea, headaches, and fatigue, as well as its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of coca plant extracts include improved oxygenation, reduced stress, and increased mental clarity. Coca leaves can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications to promote overall well-being.
